name: openclaw-desktop
description: OpenClaw desktop packager based on Tauri

scripts.dist:win: npm run prepare:kernel && tauri build --bundles nsis,msi
scripts.dist:win:ci: npm run prepare:kernel && tauri build --bundles msi
scripts.dist:linux: npm run prepare:kernel && tauri build --bundles appimage,deb,rpm
scripts.dist:linux:ci: npm run prepare:kernel && tauri build --bundles deb
scripts.dist:linux:appimage: npm run prepare:kernel && tauri build --bundles appimage
scripts.dist:mac:tauri: npm run prepare:kernel && tauri build --bundles dmg
